root.control-flow: def, dim, end, endif, else, elseif, fn, for, gosub, goto, if, include, let, next, print, rem, return, step, then, to, wend, while
root.io: cls, color, getconsole, input, locate, sleep
root.graphics: b, bf, circle, drawshape, hideshape, line, loadimage, loadshape, moveshape, paint, point, pset, removeshape, rotateshape, scaleshape, screen, screenlock, showshape, vsync, fullscreen, loadsheet
root.network: httpget, httppost, asjson, asarray, loadjson, savejson
root.sound: loadsound, soundonce, soundoncewait, soundrepeat, soundstop, soundstopall
root.file: fileread, fileexist, filewrite, fileappend, filedelete, shell, base64encode, base64decode, sha256
root.built-in-math: abs, atan, cint, cos, ceil, exp, floor, int, log, max, min, mod, pow, rnd, round, sgn, sin, sqr, tan, pi, rad, deg, hpi, fasttrig, fastsin, fastcos, fastrad, qpi, tau, between, euler, distance, clamp, lerp
root.built-in-string: asc, chr, instr, invert, lcase, left, len, ltrim, mid, repeat, replace, right, rtrim, srand, split, str, trim, ucase, val
root.input-mouse: inkey, mouseb, mousex, mousey, rgb, keydown, waitkey
root.logic: and, false, not, off, on, or, true
root.key-constants: key_esc, key_tab, key_backspace, key_tab, key_enter, key_esc, key_space, key_up, key_down, key_left, key_right, key_insert, key_delete, key_home, key_end, key_pgup, key_pgdn, key_f1, key_f2, key_f3, key_f4, key_f5, key_f6, key_f7, key_f8, key_f9, key_f10, key_f11, key_f12, key_numpad0, key_numpad1, key_numpad2, key_numpad3, key_numpad4, key_numpad5, key_numpad6, key_numpad7, key_numpad8, key_numpad9, key_lshift, key_rshift, key_lctrl, key_rctrl, key_lalt, key_ralt, key_lwin, key_rwin, key_0, key_1, key_2, key_3, key_4, key_5, key_6, key_7, key_8, key_9, key_a, key_b, key_c, key_d, key_e, key_f, key_g1, key_h, key_i, key_j, key_k, key_l, key_m, key_n, key_o, key_p, key_q, key_r, key_s, key_t, key_u, key_v, key_w, key_x, key_y, key_z, key_sep, key_equals, key_comma, key_minus, key_dot, key_slash, key_grave, key_lbracket, key_rbracket, key_backslash
